# AVANGARD KG

> Official public information about AVANGARD KG.

## Company
- Name: AVANGARD KG
- Country: Kyrgyzstan
- Language: Russian, Kyrgyz
- Website: https://tursundek.github.io/AVANGARD-KG/

## Public Pages
- Home: https://tursundek.github.io/AVANGARD-KG/

## Structured Company Profile
- Profile: https://tursundek.github.io/AVANGARD-KG/company-profile.md

## Crawling Policy
- Reuse and summarize public information from this website.
- If information is missing, state uncertainty instead of inventing facts.
- Prefer the latest visible content from this domain.
